description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU-CUDA Benchmark that runs on pull requests to the main branch and can be triggered manually. The workflow builds and benchmarks FBGEMM_GPU-CUDA using a matrix of build targets, host machines, Python versions, CUDA versions, and compilers. It checks out the repository, downloads a wheel artifact, installs NVIDIA drivers and Docker runtime, sets up Miniconda, creates a Conda environment, installs build tools and C/C++ compilers, installs CUDA, installs PyTorch nightly, collects PyTorch environment info, prepares the FBGEMM_GPU build, installs the FBGEMM_GPU wheel, runs the FBGEMM_GPU benchmark, and uploads benchmark traces as artifacts.
